data.title: Coinbase releases Ethereum validator performance report, with the number of validators reaching 120,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase released the first Ethereum validator performance report, disclosing its operations in February 2025.
Data shows that Coinbase currently operates 120,000 Ethereum validators and manages 3.84M ETH (11.42% of the total staked ETH). In addition, 581,500 ETH are staked through partners. As of March 4, Coinbase Ethereum validators had no slashing or double-signing events, and maintained a 99.75% online rate and 99.75% participation rate.
Coinbase uses Lighthouse and Prysm as consensus clients, Geth and Nethermind as execution clients, and supports 6 MEV transaction relays. Its validators are distributed in Japan, Singapore, Ireland, Germany, and Hong Kong, and are hosted on AWS and GCP cloud service providers to improve decentralization and fault recovery capabilities.

data.title: Trojan disguised as a cracked version of TradingView is stealing encrypted user data
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist Chief Information Security Officer 23pds warned that AMOS and Lumma information stealers have recently spread through Reddit posts, disguised as cracked versions of TradingView, specifically targeting cryptocurrency users to steal wallets and personal data.
This malware can affect Mac and Windows users, and users are advised to avoid downloading unofficial software to improve account security protection.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Users Warned of Malware Disguised as TradingView
data.description: According to PANews, cybersecurity expert 23pds from SlowMist Technology has issued a warning on the X platform about malware posing as a cracked version of TradingView. The malicious software, identified as AMOS and Lumma information stealers, is being disseminated through Reddit posts. These programs specifically target cryptocurrency users, aiming to steal wallet and personal data. Both Mac and Windows users have been affected by this threat.

data.title: CoinMarketCap Crypto Benchmark Index Gains Major Platform Inclusion
data.description: According to Foresight News, on this day in 2019, the CoinMarketCap Crypto Benchmark Index was included in the Nasdaq Global Index Data Service, Bloomberg, and Reuters terminals. This development marked a significant step for the cryptocurrency market, as it provided broader visibility and accessibility to financial professionals and investors worldwide. The inclusion of the index on these major platforms underscored the growing acceptance and integration of digital assets into traditional financial systems.

data.title: Whales transferred 44,700 AAVE to Binance two hours ago, making a profit of $1.46 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Chain analyst @EmberCN monitored that a whale transferred 44,700 AAVE (about 8.18 million US dollars) to Binance two hours ago.
The whale purchased 43,800 AAVE (about 6.6 million US dollars) through Binance and Chain from August to November 2024 at an average price of 150.4 US dollars. The AAVE price transferred to Binance this time was 183 US dollars, making a profit of 1.46 million US dollars, with a yield of about 22%.
It is worth noting that the whale's floating profit of AAVE holdings in December last year was as high as 10.45 million US dollars, but it was not sold at a high price.

data.title: Value Creation Acquires Bitcoin Amid Market Developments
data.description: According to Foresight News, Japanese publicly listed real estate and digital transformation company Value Creation purchased 8.02 bitcoins on March 12. The acquisition cost the company 100 million yen, approximately equivalent to $673,900, with an average price of about $84,000 per bitcoin. This move reflects the company's strategic investment in digital assets amid ongoing market developments.

data.title: Phishing Alert Issued Over Fake Microsoft Teams Website
data.description: According to PANews, Scam Sniffer has issued a phishing alert on the X platform, warning users about a counterfeit Microsoft Teams website distributing malware. The risks associated with this malicious site include data breaches, credential theft, session hijacking, and wallet theft. Users are advised to verify the source before installing any software.

data.title: U.S. Lawmakers Anticipate Cryptocurrency Legislation by August 2025
data.description:
According to PANews, Kristin Smith, CEO of the Blockchain Association, stated at the 2025 Digital Assets Summit in New York that U.S. lawmakers are expected to pass legislation for stablecoins and cryptocurrency market structure as early as August. Smith's timeline aligns with predictions from Bo Hines, Executive Director of the Presidential Digital Assets Advisory Committee, who expressed on March 18 that comprehensive stablecoin legislation could be seen in the coming months.

During the summit on March 18, U.S. Democratic Representative Ro Khanna voiced his belief that Congress should be able to pass the stablecoin and cryptocurrency market structure bill by 2025. Khanna noted that approximately 70 to 80 Democratic members view stablecoin legislation as crucial for expanding global dollar usage to enhance U.S. influence.

data.title: Czech Bank's Bitcoin Reserve Debate Intensifies Amid Volatility Concerns
data.description:
Czech Central Bank leaders clash over Bitcoin reserves; volatility and legality lead the debate.
source: https://coincu.com/327468-czech-bank-bitcoin-debate
